name: Topicus.com
confidenceReason: Strong Sharpe (0.75), executing CSU playbook flawlessly in Europe. 4% organic growth in stagnant macro proves pricing power. €625M deployed.
bullCase: Topicus is executing the Constellation playbook flawlessly in Europe. Achieving 4% organic growth in a stagnant European macro environment proves absolute pricing power. Their recent €625M capital deployment signals a transition to massive, centralized compounding.
bearCase: European macroeconomic stagnation and complex cross-border regulations could slow M&A velocity. The optical 247x P/E requires constant investor education to prevent panic sell-offs.

cagrModel.basis: Normalized adjusted EPS ex-NRI; CSU spinoff serial acquirer with premium VMS-style multiple
